name: dis-body
comment: BODY:Body Text paragraph from sample.idml page 5 (Dis eictur...). Open Sans 8pt, ~270pt column. Three-line paragraph; tests short-paragraph break behaviour.

spec.text: Dis eictur, tem conseque qui nulpa sam doluptas quibus ute quatur, quament iisquas voleceris aut hil id quiste doloris cipsum eos sequi odionse rsperfe rumquo magnatem fugia consequiat.

expected_lines: Dis eictur, tem conseque qui nulpa sam doluptas quibus ute quatur,
quament iisquas voleceris aut hil id quiste doloris cipsum eos sequi
odionse rsperfe rumquo magnatem fugia consequiat.
